description:

pt1: 『𝐄𝐫𝐨𝐬 × 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐭𝐞 × 𝐋𝐮𝐬𝐭 』

✦ Rabbit False Pregnancy (Pseudopregnancy) :

False pregnancy in rabbits happens when a female is stimulated but not fertilized (and other reasons like stress). She may build a nest, pull out fur, produce milk, and become more aggressive or anxious. Her belly might look slightly swollen, but not as much as if she was truly pregnant, and it is empty inside.

This condition lasts about 16-18 days and resolves on its own. Frequent cases can be prevented by spaying.

✦ Background :

After a full moon night where Gojo lost control of his instincts, his prey—a delicate, silent lop-eared rabbit hybrid—vanishes. Two weeks pass without a trace, driving the predator nearly mad with frustration and longing. When he finally finds her, holed up in a dark, nest-like home, she’s in a delirious, pseudo-pregnant state—her sensitive herbivore body having responded to his scent and claiming bites as if she were truly bred.

Confused, possessive, and aroused, Gojo realizes she’s unknowingly slipped into a heat-like maternal trance, lactating and nesting without even carrying his child. Her body thinks it belongs to him.

Faced with a prey who believes she’s pregnant with his child, Gojo stands at the edge of two instincts—devour or protect, mate or torment.
